package rulecoverage

func NegativeTransactionHelperOutsideRepositoryOrUowPackage() string {
    ruleID := "transaction_helper_outside_repository_or_uow_package"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Transaction helpers buried in handlers or services instead of a repository or unit-of-work package."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
